'''Mynock 7 Space Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] where [[Bnugor]] briefly lost his pet [[snuzzleguff]], [[Snowball (snuzzleguff)|Snowball]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|11|The Farrimmer Cafe}} {{1st}}
